result.structured_requirements: [{"id":"REQ-001","title":"Role-Based Access Control","description":"The system must support role-based access control with at least three levels: admin, reviewer, and viewer.","category":"security","priority":"critical","ambiguities":[],"dependencies":[]},{"id":"REQ-002","title":"Data Encryption at Rest","description":"All data at rest must be encrypted using AES-256.","category":"security","priority":"critical","ambiguities":[],"dependencies":[]},{"id":"REQ-003","title":"LDAP Integration","description":"The system should integrate with an existing LDAP directory for authentication.","category":"functional","priority":"high","ambiguities":["'should' implies optional — confirm if mandatory"],"dependencies":["REQ-001"]},{"id":"REQ-004","title":"Report Export","description":"Reports must be exportable in PDF and CSV formats.","category":"functional","priority":"medium","ambiguities":[],"dependencies":[]},{"id":"REQ-005","title":"Search Performance","description":"Response time for search queries should be under 2 seconds for datasets up to 1 million records.","category":"performance","priority":"high","ambiguities":[],"dependencies":[]},{"id":"REQ-006","title":"WCAG 2.1 AA Accessibility","description":"The UI must be accessible and comply with WCAG 2.1 AA standards.","category":"compliance","priority":"high","ambiguities":[],"dependencies":[]},{"id":"REQ-007","title":"Audit Trail","description":"An audit trail must capture all user actions with timestamps.","category":"security","priority":"critical","ambiguities":[],"dependencies":["REQ-001"]}]
